_description: Path mapping for Steam Deck running RetroDeck (Flatpak).
_saves_root_note: Informational only. Runtime path construction uses $CONTINUITY_SAVES_ROOT from the PAL, not this field.
_container_note: RetroDeck runs RetroArch; Phase 2 targets the uncompressed .srm setting (save_file_compression off). Compressed (rzip) saves are quarantined until the Phase 3 codec integration.
_rom_roots_note: Informational. Runtime ROM-anchoring reads $CONTINUITY_ROMS_ROOT from the PAL (data/roms/<system>), not this field.
